pages.title: Boss Rule Basics
pages.text: Boss rules transform normal mobs into powerful bosses with unique abilities.$(br2)File location:$(br2)$odata/<namespace>/mob_levels/bosses/<name>.json$

pages.title: Core Fields
pages.text: $(bold)enabled$() (bool, default: true) - Master switch$(br2)$(bold)target_mobs$() (string array) - Entity IDs this can apply to$(br2)$(bold)spawn_chance$() (double, 0.0-1.0, default: 0.1) - Probability on eligible spawn$(br2)$(bold)tier$() (int, default: 1) - Higher = more specific/important$(br2)$(bold)level$() (int, default: 50) - Boss level$(br2)$(bold)ignore_level_cap$() (bool, default: true)

pages.title: Location Filters
pages.text: Optional restrictions:$(br2)$(bold)structures$() (string array) - Only in these structures$(br2)$(bold)biomes$() (string array) - Only in these biomes$(br2)If none specified, boss can spawn anywhere target mobs spawn.$(br2)Example: $(o)"structures": ["minecraft:fortress"]$()

pages.title: Visual Fields
pages.text: $(bold)display_name$() (string, default: "§c§lBoss") - Custom name$(br2)$(bold)glow_effect$() (bool, default: true)$(br2)$(bold)glow_color$() (string, default: "red")$(br2)$(bold)size_multiplier$() (float, default: 1.0)$(br2)$(bold)particle_effect$() (string, optional) - Particle ID

pages.title: Boss Bar Fields
pages.text: $(bold)boss_bar$() (object):$(br2){$(br)  "color": "red",$(br)  "style": "notched_10",$(br)  "visible": true$(br)}$(br2)Colors: pink, blue, red, green, yellow, purple, white$(br2)Styles: progress, notched_6, notched_10, notched_12, notched_20

pages.title: Combat Fields
pages.text: $(bold)immunities$() (string array):$(br2)  $(o)fire, drowning, fall_damage, knockback$()$(br2)$(bold)stat_multipliers$() (object):$(br2){$(br)  "minecraft:generic.max_health": 3.0,$(br)  "minecraft:generic.attack_damage": 2.0$(br)}$(br2)$(bold)xp_multiplier$() (double, default: 5.0)$(br2)$(bold)loot_table$() (string) - Custom loot table ID

pages.title: Minion Fields
pages.text: $(bold)minions$() (object):$(br2){$(br)  "type": "minecraft:zombie",$(br)  "count": 4,$(br)  "interval_seconds": 30,$(br)  "health_threshold": 0.5,$(br)  "max_minions": 8$(br)}$(br2)Minions spawn when boss health drops below threshold. Count per wave.
